params.name: Legend of the White Snake
params.description: The Legend of the White Snake originated in Zhenjiang during the early Tang dynasty, telling the legendary love story of the snake spirit Bai Suzhen and the scholar Xu Xian, including classic episodes such as borrowing an umbrella on a boat, stealing the lingzhi immortal herb, and flooding the Jinshan Temple. This legend combines romanticism with realism, featuring a compact structure, dramatic plot twists, and vivid character portrayals. It also reflects ancient Chinese folk customs, possessing …
